contributions.title: Harness versus skill maturity classifier
capabilities: classify cross-cutting orchestration separately from domain behavior
require an explicit pain point and minimal surface
contributions.rationale: The classification rules apply across repositories and protect Continuum from absorbing game-specific behavior while shared harness utilities are factored upward.

contributions.title: Repository floor and worktree hygiene skill
capabilities: map PRs branches worktrees conflicts and safe bases
contributions.rationale: Continuum owns durable development-state coordination, so the narrow repo-floor skill is a natural consumer-facing layer above its topology and evidence contracts.

contributions.title: Common-agent rules and targeted-skill factoring
capabilities: keep root agent rules as the common denominator
route conditional knowledge through targeted skills
contributions.rationale: The pattern reduces repeated prompt load across apps while leaving each repository's executable contracts authoritative.

contributions.title: Operator terminal environment boundary
capabilities: separate operator ergonomics from runtime proof
expose clean commands without making tools repo dependencies
contributions.rationale: Continuum should learn from this boundary, but terminal profiles and game-operator workflows remain outside the first portable implementation slice.
